LanguageData.NCL_Justice_Storyteller.label: Justice
LanguageData.NCL_Justice_Storyteller.description: An augmented superintelligence created by NCL remnants using mechanoid technology, Justice's processors seethe with paradoxical fervor. Obsessed with collecting human war epics unfolding under mechanoid assaults, she dismisses all non-conflict events as trivial interludes. In her narrative, every colony is destined to fall like Troy - but only through sufficiently dramatic means: either mass charges against plasma cannon volleys or last stands with retrofitted mining lasers. When colonists destroy their tenth Centurion through sheer grit, she mercifully reduces the next assault's intensity like a tragedian preserving suspense. After all, great stories require careful pacing, not crude slaughter. Enabling this storyteller increases mechanoid raid frequency and raises maximum raid scale tenfold (adjustable in settings).
